facts:
CANON_GUARDIAN: CANON_GUARDIAN has Vertex AI as a deployment option.
CANON_GUARDIAN belongs to the 'Ã crÃ©er en premier / Top 5 founders' family of agents.
CANON_GUARDIAN is deployed on Vertex AI or locally.
CANON_GUARDIAN has the Claude Code skill 'freeze-guardian (reduced)'.
The freeze-guardian Claude Code skill is mapped as a reduced skill for the CANON_GUARDIAN agent.
CANON_GUARDIAN is described in the `OBSIDIA_TOUS_LES_AGENTS.docx` document.
CANON_GUARDIAN is a Top 5 founding agent.
CANON_GUARDIAN is the guardian of the canon Obsidia.
CANON_GUARDIAN belongs to the Fondateurs family, designated as 'Ã crÃ©er en premier (top 5)'.
CANON_GUARDIAN protects the canon Obsidia.
CANON_GUARDIAN verifies name collisions for Obsidia.
CANON_GUARDIAN verifies name collisions for X-108.
CANON_GUARDIAN verifies name collisions for AVDR.
CANON_GUARDIAN verifies name collisions for ACP.
CANON_GUARDIAN verifies name collisions for Freeze.
CANON_GUARDIAN verifies name collisions for Kernel.
CANON_GUARDIAN verifies name collisions for MÃ©moire fractale.
CANON_GUARDIAN verifies name collisions for 34 arbres.
CANON_GUARDIAN verifies name collisions for Frise humaine.
CANON_GUARDIAN verifies name collisions for Balance exponentielle.
CANON_GUARDIAN verifies name collisions for Calibration procÃ©durale.
